chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D-4884 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For hearing of CMA No.20778/2022 (stay) 2. For hearing of Main Case 30.08.2022 Ms. Fouzia Rasheed, Advocate for the Petitioner. Ms. Masooda Siraj, Advocate for the Respondent. Mirza Nadeem Taqi, Advocate for the Respondent..-.-.-.-.-. Pursuant to Court’s notice, M/s. Masooda Siraj and Mirza Nadeem Taqi, Advocates have shown appearance, undertake to file their Vakalatnamas as well as para-wise comments on behalf of the Respondents and claims copies of the petition along with annexures, which the learned counsel for the petitioner undertakes to supply. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that the consignments covered by this petition are pending for clearance, whereas against Order-in-Revision No.60/2022 dated 29.06.2022, petitioner’s Appeal is pending before Customs Appellate Tribunal. She submits that ad-interim orders be passed for release of the consignments as petitioner is willing to secure the differential amount of duties and taxes before the Nazir of this Court. In the circumstances, by way of an interim arrangement, let the disputed amount of duty and taxes be deposited with the Nazir of this Court by way of Pay Order[s] / Bank Guarantee in respect of consignment[s] covered by this petition. Once the amount is secured as above, Nazir shall issue appropriate Certificate[s] to that effect, which shall be presented before the concerned Collectorate / Department, who shall release the consignment forthwith. If the amount is secured by way of pay order, Nazir shall invest the same in some profit bearing instruments as per rules.

Once the amount is secured as above, Nazir shall issue appropriate Certificate[s] to that effect, which shall be presented before the concerned Collectorate / Department, who shall release the consignment forthwith. If the amount is secured by way of pay order, Nazir shall invest the same in some profit bearing instruments as per rules. Fee of the Nazir is settled at Rs.5,000/- per certificate. Petition stands disposed of alongwith listed application[s]. JUDGE JUDGE SM
